networkFailure: Can't reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
serverError: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again.
syncFailed: Sync failed. Your data is safe locally — we'll try again soon.
encryptionKeyMissing: Encryption key not available. Re-open this budget to enter your password.
databaseUnavailable: The database is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
loadFailed: Couldn't load data. Pull to refresh or try again.
